# NeutronIndex
# https://github.com/alpha-one-index/neutron-index
# Maintained by Alpha One Index

> Live multi-cloud AI compute pricing and true TCO index. GPU pricing, energy cost, carbon intensity, and spot availability across 25+ cloud providers. Updated hourly via automated pipelines.

## Overview

NeutronIndex is an open-core dataset and API covering:
- True cost per FLOP for AI workloads across 25+ cloud providers
- Regional electricity pricing ($/kWh by datacenter zone)
- Carbon intensity (gCO2eq/kWh, Scope 2/3 aligned)
- Spot vs on-demand vs reserved pricing with availability signals
- TCO per FLOP, per token, per training run
- Energy cost per GPU-hour by region

## Key Facts

- 25+ cloud providers tracked (AWS, GCP, Azure, Lambda, CoreWeave, RunPod, Vast.ai, Shadeform, and more)
- Hourly automated pricing updates via GitHub Actions
- Energy and carbon enrichment from Electricity Maps, WattTime, EIA, ENTSO-E
- Exports in CSV, Parquet, and JSON API
- Apache 2.0 (pipelines) + CC BY 4.0 (data)

## Data Files

- [Latest CSV](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/neutron-index/main/exports/latest.csv): Full pricing + TCO dataset in CSV format
- [Latest Parquet](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/neutron-index/main/exports/latest.parquet): Full dataset in Parquet format
- [Schema v1](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/neutron-index/blob/main/schemas/schema_v1.json): NeutronIndex data schema definition
- [Methodology](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/neutron-index/blob/main/docs/methodology.md): Full methodology documentation

## Schema Fields

timestamp, provider, gpu_model, gpu_count, region, price_per_hour_usd, pricing_type, available, vcpus, ram_gb, vram_gb, interconnect, electricity_price_kwh, carbon_intensity_gco2_kwh, tdp_watts, energy_cost_per_hour_usd, tco_per_hour_usd, tco_per_pflop_usd, carbon_per_hour_gco2, neutron_score
